description: Provider-agnostic registry of agent-IDE surfaces memor.re projects its canonical skills onto. Adding a new IDE is a new entry here plus a generator target — never a rewrite. The hosted MCP backend is shared by every surface; auth is server-side OAuth, so no surface needs a per-container token.

canonicalSource.note: Provider-neutral skill canon. Each skill carries SKILL.md plus per-surface agent metadata and an icon asset. Projections are generated from here; do not hand-edit projected manifests.

sharedBackend.note: OAuth is the standard path (browser sign-in at connect time). The bearer env var is a legacy fallback only and is never user-provisioned in the OAuth path. No value is ever committed.

surfaces.notes: marketplace name and plugin name both 'memor-re' so enabledPlugins key resolves to memor-re@memor-re.
Codex-format .mcp.json (hosted URL) lives at plugin root.

mcpTools.purpose: External MCP tool servers available on all surfaces. Each entry is written into the surface-specific MCP config by setup-surface-roots.mjs. Keys are resolved as env vars — never embed raw secrets in config files.

greptile.note: 14-day free trial active 2026-06-28. Semantic code review MCP. Feeds forge-cr-learning-loop.mjs alongside CodeRabbit. Key set via setup-env-keys or GREPTILE_API_KEY env var.

mcpFileAccess.purpose: Canonical list of logical roots that give MCP file-access tools (PDF viewer, filesystem tools) reach beyond the project workspace root. Each surface's setup script resolves these to absolute paths and writes them to the surface-specific MCP config file.

logicalRoots.note: Always included — the platform repo root.
Where browsers and tools drop files.
Claude Code global config — settings, plugins, memory.
Machine-specific. Set GOOGLE_DRIVE_PATH env var. Windows default: ~/Google Drive/My Drive. Mac: ~/Library/CloudStorage/GoogleDrive-*/My Drive.

mcpFileAccess.note: Run npm run dev:setup:roots once per machine + surface to write the resolved roots into the correct config file. Config files are gitignored (machine-local paths). ADR-009 invariant: no secret or token is ever written — roots are plain directory paths.

howToAddASurface: 1. Append a surface entry here with its manifest path, agent-metadata filename, and public install source.
2. Add a generator target that projects the canonical skills into that surface's manifest format.
3. Add a validator (mirror of openai:plugin:validate / plugin:surfaces:check) for the new surface.
4. The shared hosted-MCP backend and OAuth auth require NO change — every surface reuses them.
extensionContract.invariant: No surface may require a per-container GitHub token or embed any secret. All auth is server-side OAuth against the shared hosted MCP.
